project.name: effected
project.tagline: The unglamorous app plumbing that Effect leaves to you, done right.

tiers.label: Integrated
tiers.definition: Imports at least one runtime package outside effect core.

tiers.label: Boundary
tiers.definition: The same @effected/*-only dependency surface as a pure package, but does IO through Effect's core FileSystem and Path services.

tiers.label: Pure
tiers.definition: Peers on effect and takes only @effected/* edges, with no IO.

tiers.label: Companion
tiers.definition: Not a library and exposes no API; published and installable, it ships pnpm catalogs and a pnpmfile that pin your effect versions and peer floors to the ones the kit was built against.

packages.name: @effected/package-json
packages.description: package.json parsing, editing, validation and file IO as Effect schemas

packages.name: @effected/store
packages.description: Durable local state on SQLite: a schema-versioned migrated store and a TTL cache with eviction, over one shared migration ledger

packages.name: @effected/workspaces
packages.description: Monorepo tooling as Effect services: root discovery, the dependency graph, package-manager detection, pnpm catalogs, lockfile IO and git change detection

packages.name: @effected/app
packages.description: The application control plane: one layer wiring XDG-namespaced directories, a migrated SQLite store, a TTL cache and a config file to the same place

packages.name: @effected/config-file
packages.description: Composable config file loading for Effect: JSON, JSONC, YAML and TOML codecs, resolution strategies and merge behaviors

packages.name: @effected/walker
packages.description: Upward path traversal as Effect primitives: ascend a directory chain and return the first candidate satisfying a predicate

packages.name: @effected/xdg
packages.description: XDG Base Directory resolution: environment paths, app-namespaced directories, native OS conventions and config-file resolvers

packages.name: @effected/runtimes
packages.description: Resolve semver-compatible Node.js, Bun and Deno runtime versions from live feeds, with an offline snapshot fallback

packages.name: @effected/tsconfig-json
packages.description: tsconfig.json handling as Effect schemas: JSONC document and compiler-option schemas, tsc-parity extends-chain resolution, nearest-config discovery and a portable subset for virtual TypeScript environments

packages.name: @effected/git
packages.description: Typed git introspection over Effect core's ChildProcessSpawner: file content and trees at any ref, ref probes, merge bases and changed files, plus checkout, the one mutation

packages.name: @effected/semver
packages.description: Strict SemVer 2.0.0 versions, ranges and comparators as Effect schemas

packages.name: @effected/jsonc
packages.description: Zero-dependency JSONC parsing, editing and formatting as Effect schemas

packages.name: @effected/yaml
packages.description: Zero-dependency YAML parsing, editing and formatting as Effect schemas

packages.name: @effected/toml
packages.description: TOML 1.0.0 parsing, editing and formatting as Effect schemas: typed diagnostics, a lossless CST and first-class date-time values

packages.name: @effected/npm
packages.description: Effect service contracts for resolving pnpm catalog: and workspace: dependency specifiers

packages.name: @effected/glob
packages.description: Full-fidelity glob matching as Effect schemas: the complete minimatch dialect compiled to pure string predicates

packages.name: @effected/lockfiles
packages.description: Pure lockfile parsing for bun, npm, pnpm and yarn Berry into one unified Effect schema model, with pure integrity checking against workspace manifests

packages.name: @effected/pnpm-plugin-effect
packages.description: pnpm config dependency for centralized catalog management across the Effected ecosystem
